collider_bias.explanation: Conditioning on AUX1_X does not introduce collider bias for the X -> Y effect.

ett.raw_estimand: ((Sum[AUX1_Z, Z](P(AUX1_Z) * P[Z](X) * P[X,Z](Y) * P[AUX1_Z](Z)) / Sum[AUX1_Z, Y, Z](Sum[AUX1_Z, Z](P(AUX1_Z) * P[Z](X) * P[X,Z](Y) * P[AUX1_Z](Z)))))
ett.observational_estimand: ((Sum[AUX1_Z, Z](P(AUX1_Z) * P(X | AUX1_Z, Z) * P(Y | AUX1_Z, X, Z) * P(Z | AUX1_Z)) / Sum[AUX1_Z, Y, Z](Sum[AUX1_Z, Z](P(AUX1_Z) * P(X | AUX1_Z, Z) * P(Y | AUX1_Z, X, Z) * P(Z | AUX1_Z)))))
